name: jogocarta
description: TCG online em tempo real — React + Node.js + Socket.io

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "CLIENT,SERVER" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && node scripts/setup.js
